In the said notification, for the entry against serial number (ix), the following entry shall be substituted, namely : — “(ix)Shri Wasim Rahatali Khan, Flat No. A/603, Gundecha Asta, A.K Road,Mehra Compound, Sakinaka, Mumbai 400 072.” [F.No11/3/2012-Waqf (Pt.II)] J. ALAM, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part – II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O.2287 (E), dated the 5th June, 2018.
